 F(0) P(1) G(2) A(3) 逞(4) 棘(5) 옰(6) 세(7)

{0x08,0xF8,0x88,0x88,0xE8,0x08,0x10,0x00,0x20,0x3F,0x20,0x00,0x03,0x00,0x00,0x00},/*"F",0*/

{0x08,0xF8,0x08,0x08,0x08,0x08,0xF0,0x00,0x20,0x3F,0x21,0x01,0x01,0x01,0x00,0x00},/*"P",1*/

{0x00,0x00,0xC0,0x38,0xE0,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x20,0x3C,0x23,0x02,0x02,0x27,0x38,0x20},/*"A",3*/

{0x00,0x02,0x42,0x62,0x52,0x4A,0x46,0x42,0x42,0x42,0x52,0x62,0xC2,0x02,0x00,0x00},
